description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-time-picker`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-time-picker/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 22 defects — 2 P0, 11 P1, 9 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [hx] `role="combobox"` on wrapper div violates ARIA 1.2 specification
- [ ] [hx] `role="alert"` + `aria-live="polite"` is contradictory

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-time-picker
